title: The Delhi Registration of Births and Deaths (Amendment) Rules, 2006
description: The Delhi Registration of Births and Deaths (Amendment) Rules, 2006
file_title: The Delhi Registration of Births and Deaths (Amendment) Rules, 2006.pdf
text: (TO BE PUBLISHED EN THE PART- IV OF THE DELHI GAZETTE- EXTRA ORDINARY) GOVERNMENT OF NATIONAL CAPITAL TERRITORY OF DELHI (PLANNING DEPARTMENT) DIRECTORATE OF ECONOMICS & STATISTICS, AND OFFICE OF THE CHIEF REGISTRAR (BIRTHS & DEATHS) ROOM NO. 148, OLD SECRETARIAT, D E L H I - 110054. (^4c No.F.13(l)/VS/DES/2006/ /J24 -J/f Dated: 14 FEB 200? N O I L F I C A T I O N No. F.13(l)/VS/DES/2006 -In exercise of the powers conferred by section 30 read with clause (f) of sub-section 1 of section 2 of the Registration of Births and Deaths Act, 1969(18 of 1969), the Lt. Governor of the National Capital Territory of Delhi , with the approval of the Central Government, hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Delhi Registration of Births and Deaths Rules. 1999, namely :- RULES 1. Short title, extent and commencement :- (1) These rules may be called the Delhi Registration of Births and Deaths (Amendment) Rules , 2006. (2) They shall extend to the whole of the National Capital Territory of Delhi. (3) They shall be deemed to come into force with immediate effect. 2. (1) .Amendment of Form No. 1- In the Delhi Registration of Births and Deaths Rules 1999, (hereinafter referred to as the " Principal Rules, ") in Form No. 1, after entry 5. the following entries shall be inserted, namely :— " 5 A- Permanent Address of Parents; 5 B- Address of Parents at the time of birth of child." (2) Amendment of Form No. 2 - In the principal Rules, in Form No.2, after entry 2(A), the following entries shall be inserted, namely :— " 2 B- Name of mother of deceased; 2 C- Permanent Address of deceased ; 2 D- Address of Deceased at the time of Death;'' (3)Amendment of form No. 5- In the principal Rules, for form No.5 , the following form shall be substituted, namelv :— TO No Form-5 Emblem ofCRS Logo TTGjJta TFTOF% & T , t e f t W$>K GOVERNMENT OF NATIONAL CAPITAL TERRITORY OF DELHI Name of local body BIRTH CERTIFICATE (T* 5 ^ ;\.-I4T£*(UI ^iSiPui, 1969 aft unr 1217 rWT fe?fr ^ I *& ifST^mw FTJT,I999 Si ^ T ? 8/13 35 3-T^TP ^f. ffcST ^C) Emblem of local body -- 1 of 6 -- I*] (Issued under Section 12/17 of the Registration of Births and Deaths Act, 1969 and Rule 8/13 of the Delhi Registration of Births and Deaths Rules, 1999) (^rr^lra' #JPT) d^<n fbrwr "^HT %<l^«< *f dfrriftsid%i This is to certify that the following information has been taken from the original record of birth which is the register for (local area /local body) of tahsil/block of District of State/Union territory ^R/Name: ftPT / Sex 3Wfafa/ Date of Birth ^ SSTTC / Place of Birth TTrTT 35T ^TFT /Name of Mother ft?H ajT^FT/ Name of Father i ^ % ^FT % ww irar fair a>r *rar / TRirftcTT^ ssrpifr w I Address of parents at the time of Birth of the child : Permanent address of parents: M>jfl*<U| qign /Registration No: ..
